_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Communicating data involves turning complex data into clear and well understood solutions, which can be acted upon; sharing data communication skills with the team and organisation; understanding and communicate different options, taking into account risks and uncertainties.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating data quality and data trust issues to non-technical executive stakeholders in terms of business risk and operational impact.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-005 (OP, cosine: 0.531), OP-S-009 (OP, cosine: 0.507).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.578). Shared vocabulary: [communicating, data]. DDaT-only terms [account, acted, clear, communicate, communication, complex] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, executive, impact, issues, non, operational] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.865, R=0.877). Balanced P/R — the 37-word DDaT element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Communicating data involves turning complex data into clear and well understood" and "Skill in communicating data quality and data trust issues to non-technical execu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.613 ≈ STS 0.578 (gap 0.035). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [communicating, data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.4%. Shared tokens: [communicating, data]. DDaT-only: [account, acted, clear, communicate, communication, complex]. WIDAI-only: [business, executive, impact, issues, non, operational].
